'iiI. f.r. q~ 'l'. 7 1 (f) irTU ;rolf.-" f't;t; ~r:r: I MINISTRY OF PERSONNEL, PUBLIC GRIEVANCES AND PENSlONS (Department of Personnel and Training) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 1st March, 1994 G.S.R. 288(E).-In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) read with clause (c) of sub-section (2) of section 35 of the Administrative Tri- bunals Act, 1985 (13 of (985), the Central Government hereby make, the following rules further to amend the Maharashtra Administrative Tribunal (Salaries and Allowances and Conditions of Service of Chairman, ViC>!-Chalrman and Members) Rules, 1986, namely :- 1. (1) These rules may be called the Maharashtra Administrative Tribunal (Salaries and Allowances and Conditions of Service of Chairman, Vice-Chairman and Members) Amendment Rules, 1994. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Offi- cial Gazette. 2. In rule 3 of tbe Mabarashtra Administrative Tribunal (Salaries and Allowances and Conditions of Service of Chairman, Vice-Chairman and Mem· bers) Rules, 1986, for the abbreviation and figures "Rs. 7300-100-7600" the abbreviation and figures "Rs. 7300-200-7500-250-8000" shall be substituted. [No. A. 1101413'93-ATl SMT. SARITA PARSAD, Jt. Secy. Foot not~ .-The Principal Rules were published vide GSR l1~<7(E), dated the 21st October, 1986 in tbe Gazette of India and subsequently amended vide notification No. GSR 71 (E) , dated 30tb January, 1992. --'----_ ._- _ . - ------- ------- Printed by the Manag~r, Govt. of lndia Press, Ring Road, Maya Pun, New Delhi· 110064 and Puoii,bed by the Controller of publications, Delhi·IJ0054. 199J -- 2 of 2 --
